accommodations.text: Permit brief movement breaks between tasks.
Allow additional wait time for verbal responses.
accommodations.source_quote: additional wait time for verbal responses

accommodations.text: Provide captions or a transcript for all audio and video media.
accommodations.source_quote: captions or a transcript for all audio and video media

accommodations.text: Repeat and rephrase spoken directions on request.
accommodations.source_quote: repeat and rephrase spoken directions on request

accommodations.text: Provide 50% extended time on tests and long assignments.
accommodations.source_quote: 50% extended time on tests and long assignments

services.source_quote: Specialized academic instruction 30 minutes 5 times weekly
Specialized academic instruction reading 30 minutes 5 times weekly

goals.text: Oscar will maintain a topic across three conversational turns in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Maintains a topic for one turn in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: maintain a topic across three conversational turns

goals.text: Emma will request clarification when she misses information in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: request clarification when she misses information

goals.text: Marcus will independently begin a classroom task within two minutes of the direction in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Begins a task within two minutes in 1 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: independently begin a classroom task within two minutes
